channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: France vs Iraq: France by 2 (74%)
item.description: Group I, 2026-06-22, Philadelphia. France 73% / draw 19% / Iraq 8%. Predicted margin 2.

item.title: Norway vs Senegal: Norway by 1 (49%)
item.description: Group I, 2026-06-22, East Rutherford. Norway 49% / draw 27% / Senegal 24%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Argentina vs Austria: Argentina by 1 (69%)
item.description: Group J, 2026-06-22, Arlington. Argentina 69% / draw 20% / Austria 11%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Jordan vs Algeria: Algeria by 1 (44%)
item.description: Group J, 2026-06-22, Santa Clara. Jordan 27% / draw 30% / Algeria 44%. Predicted margin 1.
